hero.badge: Your life is now an RPG · Beta access open
hero.subtitle_main: Drink water, train, study, sleep early, and watch your character evolve, drop loot and face bosses.

what.title: The first RPG whose story is your life.
what.subtitle: Not just another habit checklist. It's a full personal progression system: attributes, classes, quests, bosses, loot and ranking. All driven by what you do in the real world.

cards.attrs_text: Strength, Mind, Charisma, Discipline and more. Every quest feeds the right attributes. See where you're strong and where you need training.
cards.missions_text: Set habits by day of the week. Skipped yesterday? The system tracks and deducts XP automatically. Nothing escapes.
cards.bosses_text: From Level 1 to 60. Each boss costs 'Boss Keys' you earn by completing quests. Discipline becomes combat power.
cards.streak_text: Flame calendar: each day with 60%+ quests done becomes a streak. Breaking hurts, keeping it is addictive.
cards.hp_text: Your character mirrors your health. Drink, eat right, sleep. The hero faints if you neglect yourself.
cards.rank_text: Compare your Power Level with adventurers worldwide. Climb by keeping your word.

diff.title: Most habit apps reward you for ticking boxes. LifeOnRPG charges you.
diff.subtitle: The difference is consequence. Here, ignoring a quest hurts the character, and that changes everything.

rows.punish_text: Forgot to log 'drink water' yesterday? The system deducts XP automatically. No excuses, no rewriting history.
rows.gold_text: Bosses drop Gold. Gold buys temporary buffs at the Time Shop. Rewards aren't cosmetic, they shape your next day.
rows.attrs_text: Every quest links to 1 main attribute and up to 2 secondary. You grow balanced, or learn where you're slacking.
rows.talk_text: Contextual notifications: 'You haven't drunk water for 4h', 'Streak at risk tonight', 'Boss unlocked'. Not spam, it's the character calling.
rows.class_text: 55 classes across 6 tiers. Your next class depends on what you prioritized. Warrior becomes Paladin only if you trained the Mind too.
rows.focus_text: No feed to scroll, no social notifications. Open the app, do your quests, close. Focus on what matters.

security.title: Your data is yours. Period.
security.subtitle: LifeOnRPG runs on the same infrastructure used by banks and fintechs, and nothing you log is accessible to third parties.

cards.tls_text: All communication between app and server uses HTTPS/TLS 1.3.
cards.rls_text: Each user only sees their own data. Enforced by database policies, no client-side bypass possible.
cards.track_text: No Facebook pixels, no invasive analytics. Only anonymous error metrics to keep the app stable.
cards.backup_text: Your progress is replicated and versioned. Nothing is lost, not by our bugs, not by changing phones.

roadmap.title: The realm is expanding.
roadmap.subtitle: You're on Beta access, everything new lands automatically in your account.

cards.ai_text: Smart advisor analyzes your habits and suggests personalized quests.
cards.habit_text: Addictions become bosses. Defeat 'Lord Procrastination' with consistent quests.
cards.party_text: Form a group with friends. Everyone must deliver to progress.
cards.loot_text: Expanded loot, crafting and weapons system with real attribute bonuses.

download.subtitle: Install the Android APK and get real-time notifications from your hero. Works offline, syncs on reconnect.

header.streak_desc: Consecutive days with ≥60% of daily quests completed.
header.protector_desc: Charges that prevent breaking the streak when failing a quest.
header.rest_desc: Recovers HP, MP and reduces fatigue after 15-60 min.
header.daily_reset: Daily reset processed: quests, meals, water and timers updated.

pricing.title: One plan. No tricks.
pricing.subtitle: Start with a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime through Paddle.
pricing.mor_note: Payments processed by Paddle.com (Merchant of Record).
